tasks.label: Java: compile active file to day out
tasks.command: $source = '${file}'; if ([System.IO.Path]::GetExtension($source) -ne '.java') { throw 'Open a .java file before running this task.' }; $repoRoot = Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}'; $dayFolder = Split-Path -Parent $source; $outFolder = Join-Path $dayFolder 'out'; $libPath = Join-Path $repoRoot 'lib\*'; $classPath = "$outFolder;$libPath"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outFolder | Out-Null; javac -cp $classPath -d $outFolder $source

tasks.label: Java: run active file from day out
tasks.command: $source = '${file}'; if ([System.IO.Path]::GetExtension($source) -ne '.java') { throw 'Open a .java file before running this task.' }; $repoRoot = Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}'; $dayFolder = Split-Path -Parent $source; $outFolder = Join-Path $dayFolder 'out'; $libPath = Join-Path $repoRoot 'lib\*'; $classPath = "$outFolder;$libPath"; $content = Get-Content -Raw $source; $className = [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($source); if ($content -match '(?m)^\s*package\s+([A-Za-z_][\w]*(?:\.[A-Za-z_][\w]*)*)\s*;') { $className = "$($Matches[1]).$className" }; java -cp $classPath $className
tasks.dependsOn: Java: compile active file to day out
